# claude_service_account (Data Source)

Fetches a single Workload Identity Federation service account by its id (`svac_...`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claude_service_account" "example" {
  id = "svac_01234567890abcdefghijklmn"
}

output "service_account_name" {
  value = data.claude_service_account.example.name
}

output "service_account_role" {
  value = data.claude_service_account.example.organization_role
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Identifier of the service account (`svac_...`).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the service account was created.
- `name` (String) Name of the service account.
- `organization_role` (String) Organization role granted to the service account.
- `type` (String) Object type, always `service_account`.
